buckets.description: Questions that investigate how the rate of photosynthesis is influenced by variable conditions such as light intensity, carbon dioxide concentration, and temperature.
Questions that test the core definition of photosynthesis, including its requirements (light, water, CO2), products (sugar, oxygen), and the role of chlorophyll or chloroplasts.
Questions requiring an understanding of the interplay between photosynthesis and respiration to predict or explain the net change in gas levels in a sealed environment.
Questions assessing the application of the scientific method to photosynthesis experiments, including identifying variables, designing control set-ups, and ensuring a fair test.

otherSamples.reason: The question stem is missing, so no sub-topic can be determined.

The answer key describes ecological interactions like food chains and nutrient cycling involving a photosynthesizer, which do not fit the provided sub-topics focused on the process, its factors, gas exchange, or experimental design.
